lines.raw: Lesson 67 | 第67课
The weekend | 周末

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What are the Johnsons going to do at the weekend?
lines.chinese: 约翰逊一家周末打算做什么？
lines.raw: What are the Johnsons going to do at the weekend? | 约翰逊一家周末打算做什么？

lines.english: Hello. Were you at the butcher's?
lines.raw: Hello. Were you at the butcher's? | 你好。你刚才在肉店吗？
Yes, I was. | 是的，我在那里。

lines.english: Were you at the butcher's, too?
lines.raw: Were you at the butcher's, too? | 你也在肉店吗？
No, I wasn't. | 不，我不在。
I was at the greengrocer's. | 我在蔬菜店。
How's Jimmy today? | 吉米今天怎么样？
He's very well, thank you. | 他很好，谢谢你。

lines.english: Was he absent from school last week?
lines.raw: Was he absent from school last week? | 他上周没去上学吗？
Yes, he was. | 是的，他没去。

lines.english: He was absent on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday.
lines.chinese: 他周一、周二、周三和周四都没去。
lines.raw: He was absent on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday. | 他周一、周二、周三和周四都没去。
How are you all keeping? | 你们都好吗？
Very well, thank you. | 我们都很好，谢谢。

lines.english: We're going to spend three days in the country!
lines.raw: We're going to spend three days in the country! | 我们要去乡下待三天！

lines.english: We're going to stay at my mother's for the weekend.
lines.chinese: 这个周末我们要待在我妈妈家。
lines.raw: We're going to stay at my mother's for the weekend. | 这个周末我们要待在我妈妈家。

lines.english: Friday, Saturday and Sunday in the country!
lines.chinese: 周五、周六和周日在乡下！
lines.raw: Friday, Saturday and Sunday in the country! | 周五、周六和周日在乡下！
Aren't you lucky! | 你们真幸运！
